---
title: "The Rev. James Upton Yonge"
---

## The Rev. James Upton Yonge

**Dates:** (1872-1958)

### Description

cousin of CMY, son of the Rev. Duke Yonge of Puslinch

### Biography

He became Vicar of Merrifield, Cornwall, before going as a missionary to Madagascar, where he and his wife are said to have started a local branch of the Mothers\' Union.

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 17th [1876]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
